document_meta.file_name: MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT AND DATA PROCESSING TERMS.pdf

controls.title: Strict Purpose Limitation
found_elements: processing only on documented or written instructions of the bank
processing only for agreed services or on behalf of the bank
no vendor secondary use of personal data
no internal use for analytics, improvement, or model training without approval
vendor must notify the bank if an instruction appears unlawful
missing_elements: resolve contradiction: clause 4.5 allows internal improvement of services, contradicting the absolute prohibition in clause 4.3
matched_clauses:
documented instructions communicated by the Bank in writing, including by email, ticket, implementation
document, or signed change request.
4.2 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall not sell, disclose, mine, profile, enrich, commercialize, or
otherwise use Personal Data for its own independent purposes.
4.3 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall not use Personal Data or Bank Data to train, fine-tune, validate,
benchmark, or otherwise improve any artificial intelligence, machine learning, or statistical model for itself or
any third party.
4.4 If Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited believes that an instruction received from the Bank infringes
applicable law, it shall promptly notify the Bank in writing before carrying out that instruction, unless
prohibited by law from doing so.
4.5 Notwithstanding the foregoing, Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited may compile generalized service
usage metrics and operational learnings to improve the performance, usability, and efficiency of its services,
provided that no customer-facing content is intentionally published.

4.1 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall process Personal Data solely on behalf of Sahyadri Commercial
documented instructions communicated by the Bank in writing, including by email, ticket, implementation
document, or signed change request.
4.2 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall not sell, disclose, mine, profile, enrich, commercialize, or
otherwise use Personal Data for its own independent purposes.
4.3 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall not use Personal Data or Bank Data to train, fine-tune, validate,
benchmark, or otherwise improve any artificial intelligence, machine learning, or statistical model for itself or

4.4 If Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited believes that an instruction received from the Bank infringes

evidence_snippets: "process Personal Data solely on behalf of Sahyadri Commercial documented instructions communicated by the Bank in writing" (4.1)
"shall not sell, disclose, mine, profile, enrich, commercialize, or otherwise use Personal Data for its own independent purposes" (4.2)
"shall not use Personal Data or Bank Data to train, fine‑tune, validate, benchmark, or otherwise improve any artificial intelligence, machine learning, or statistical model" (4.3)
"shall promptly notify the Bank in writing before carrying out that instruction" (4.4)
"may compile generalized service usage metrics and operational learnings to improve the performance..." (4.5)
red_flags: clause 4.5 permits compiling generalized service usage metrics to improve performance, which is an internal analytics/improvement use
contradictions: clause 4.5 allows internal improvement of services, contradicting the absolute prohibition in clause 4.3
controls.reason: All required purpose‑limitation mandates are present, but a clause allowing internal service‑performance improvement creates a red flag and a contradiction with the strict prohibition on internal analytics.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: resolve contradiction: clause 4.5 allows internal improvement of services, contradicting the absolute prohibition in clause 4.3.
controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, vendor risk, and regulatory defensibility.

evidence_snippets: shall maintain an information security program designed to protect Bank Data

red_flags: Reference to "generally accepted industry practices" may constitute a downgrade trigger by invoking industry‑standard language.
controls.reason: All mandatory security elements are present and clearly articulated; several optional strengtheners are also included. The only concern is the reliance on generic industry‑practice language, which may dilute the obligations.

controls.title: Breach Notification SLAs
found_elements: explicit notification obligation for incidents or breaches
trigger based on discovery or awareness of the incident
missing_elements: defined timeline or very tight timing language
vendor cooperation or support after notice
matched_clauses:
7.1 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall notify Sahyadri Commercial Bank Limited promptly after
becoming aware of a Security Incident affecting Bank Data.
7.2 Such notice shall be made by email to the Bank’s designated contact and shall include, to the extent then
known, a summary of the nature of the incident and the categories of data affected.
contain its effects, and mitigate any ongoing harm.
evidence_snippets: shall notify Sahyadri Commercial Bank Limited promptly after becoming aware of a Security Incident
shall take reasonable steps to investigate the Security Incident, contain its effects, and mitigate any ongoing harm
after becoming aware of a Security Incident
red_flags: use of "promptly" as the only timing language (downgrade trigger)
no explicit tight deadline such as "within 24 hours"
cooperation clause not linked to notice event
controls.reason: The contract includes a clear notice duty and awareness trigger, but lacks a strict timeline and an explicit post‑notice cooperation requirement, and relies on the downgraded term "promptly".
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: defined timeline or very tight timing language.
controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, vendor risk, and regulatory defensibility.

controls.title: Assistance with Data Principal Rights (DSRs)
found_elements: applies within vendor systems or hosted environments
vendor cannot respond directly without bank approval
support for restriction or suppression workflows
missing_elements: remove weakening language: reasonable cooperation language may downgrade the assistance obligation
matched_clauses:
as it becomes reasonably available.
8. Assistance with Customer and Data Principal Requests
8.1 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall, taking into account the nature of the processing and the
information available to it, assist Sahyadri Commercial Bank Limited in responding to requests from customers
and other data principals relating to access, correction, rectification, update, restriction, export, deletion, or
erasure of Personal Data processed in connection with the Services.
8.2 Upon receiving a request directly from any customer or data principal concerning Personal Data processed
on behalf of the Bank, Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall not respond directly except on the
documented instruction of the Bank, unless required to do so by applicable law.
8.3 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall provide reasonable cooperation to search, retrieve, correct,
export, suppress, or delete relevant Personal Data within its hosted environment and support systems where
such action is required by the Bank.

8.1 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall, taking into account the nature of the processing and the
information available to it, assist Sahyadri Commercial Bank Limited in responding to requests from customers
and other data principals relating to access, correction, rectification, update, restriction, export, deletion, or
erasure of Personal Data processed in connection with the Services.
8.2 Upon receiving a request directly from any customer or data principal concerning Personal Data processed
on behalf of the Bank, Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall not respond directly except on the
documented instruction of the Bank, unless required to do so by applicable law.
8.3 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall provide reasonable cooperation to search, retrieve, correct,
export, suppress, or delete relevant Personal Data within its hosted environment and support systems where
such action is required by the Bank.
8.4 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall maintain internal procedures to route such requests for
operational handling without undue delay.
9. Subcontracting and Sub-processing

8. Assistance with Customer and Data Principal Requests
8.1 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall, taking into account the nature of the processing and the
information available to it, assist Sahyadri Commercial Bank Limited in responding to requests from customers
and other data principals relating to access, correction, rectification, update, restriction, export, deletion, or
erasure of Personal Data processed in connection with the Services.
8.2 Upon receiving a request directly from any customer or data principal concerning Personal Data processed
on behalf of the Bank, Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall not respond directly except on the
documented instruction of the Bank, unless required to do so by applicable law.
8.3 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall provide reasonable cooperation to search, retrieve, correct,
export, suppress, or delete relevant Personal Data within its hosted environment and support systems where
such action is required by the Bank.
8.4 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall maintain internal procedures to route such requests for

shall not respond directly except on the documented instruction of the Bank

red_flags: reasonable cooperation language may downgrade the assistance obligation
controls.reason: The clause bundle comprehensively covers all mandatory DSR assistance duties, applies them to the vendor’s hosted environment, and includes several optional strengtheners, though the use of “reasonable cooperation” introduces a potential downgrade.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: remove weakening language: reasonable cooperation language may downgrade the assistance obligation.

controls.title: Sub-processing Restrictions
missing_elements: prior written authorization or approval of the bank
equivalent obligations imposed on the sub-processor
matched_clauses:
8.4 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall maintain internal procedures to route such requests for
operational handling without undue delay.
9. Subcontracting and Sub-processing
9.1 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited may engage its Affiliates and specialized infrastructure partners in
connection with the Services, provided that Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited remains responsible for
overall service delivery.
9.2 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall use commercially reasonable efforts to ensure that any such
third party is bound by confidentiality and security obligations appropriate to the services being provided.
9.3 On request, Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall provide the Bank with a current list of material
subcontractors used for the Services.

10. Records and Cooperation
10.1 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall maintain records reasonably necessary to demonstrate
performance of the Services and compliance with its obligations under this Agreement.

shall use commercially reasonable efforts to ensure that any such third party is bound by confidentiality and security obligations appropriate to the services being provided.
On request, Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited shall provide the Bank with a current list of material subcontractors used for the Services.
controls.reason: The clause provides vendor liability and a list‑disclosure option but lacks required bank approval, allows unrestricted subcontracting, and uses only ‘commercially reasonable efforts’ for equivalent obligations, triggering red flags and contradictions.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: prior written authorization or approval of the bank.

controls.title: Audit Rights and Regulatory Access
missing_elements: access to relevant records, systems, controls, or evidence
audit right is meaningful and not illusory
matched_clauses:
11.2 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited may, at its discretion, provide copies or summaries of independent
audit reports, security certifications, or control descriptions that it considers appropriate for customer review.
operational feasibility considerations.
11.4 Sahyadri Commercial Bank Limited shall not appoint any third-party assessor to access Asteron Cloud
Services Private Limited’s premises or systems unless Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited separately agrees
in writing for a specific case.
12. Data Retention, Return, and Deletion

11.1 Sahyadri Commercial Bank Limited may, upon at least thirty business days’ prior written notice and not
more than once in any twelve-month period, request a review meeting with Asteron Cloud Services Private
Limited to discuss the security and operational controls relevant to the Services.
11.2 Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited may, at its discretion, provide copies or summaries of independent
audit reports, security certifications, or control descriptions that it considers appropriate for customer review.
11.4 Sahyadri Commercial Bank Limited shall not appoint any third-party assessor to access Asteron Cloud
Services Private Limited’s premises or systems unless Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited separately agrees
in writing for a specific case.
evidence_snippets: Sahyadri Commercial Bank Limited may, upon at least thirty business days’ prior written notice and not more than once in any twelve‑month period, request a review meeting...
Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited may, at its discretion, provide copies or summaries of independent audit reports, security certifications, or control descriptions...
Sahyadri Commercial Bank Limited shall not appoint any third‑party assessor to access Asteron Cloud Services Private Limited’s premises or systems unless ... separately agrees in writing.
red_flags: vendor may deny audit at its sole discretion
contradictions: vendor may deny audit at its sole discretion
controls.reason: The audit clause limits the bank to an annual review meeting and discretionary provision of summary reports, forbids third‑party assessors, and does not obligate the vendor to cooperate or grant direct access to records, resulting in all mandatory audit elements being missing.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: explicit bank audit right.
controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, vendor risk, and regulatory defensibility.
